inputs.question: AI 搜索引擎 2027 年的发展趋势：技术架构、商业模式、用户体验各有什么变化

evidence_cards.claim: AI search engines adopt large language models (LLMs) for semantic understanding of queries and answer generation, moving beyond keyword matching.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future of Search Trends & AI SEO: 2026–2027
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: AI search, powered by large language models (LLMs), adds new layers: Semantic understanding of questions… Answer generation and synthesis… Contextual follow-ups…

evidence_cards.claim: Search shifts from a list of links to conversational interactions with AI-driven answers and follow-ups.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future of Search Trends & AI SEO: 2026–2027
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: From Links to Conversations… Query → AI answer → Follow-up question → Refined answer → (Maybe) click one or two links

evidence_cards.claim: AI search increasingly relies on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to pull real-time web data instead of static training data.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future-Proofing Your AI Search Strategy: Preparing for 2027 and Beyond
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems that pull real-time web data are becoming the standard. By 2027, most AI search will be primarily based on live web data, not static training.

evidence_cards.claim: Agentic AI systems emerge that can autonomously evaluate products, initiate trials, and make purchasing decisions on behalf of users.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future-Proofing Your AI Search Strategy: Preparing for 2027 and Beyond
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Agentic AI systems are already capable of browsing the web, comparing products, filling out forms, and executing tasks on behalf of users. By 2027, expect AI agents that can evaluate SaaS products… initiate free trials… make purchasing recommendations…

evidence_cards.claim: Multimodal search (image, voice, video) becomes mainstream, requiring optimization beyond text.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future-Proofing Your AI Search Strategy: Preparing for 2027 and Beyond
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Multimodal search goes mainstream. Users are increasingly searching with images, voice, video… A marketing director might take a screenshot and ask an AI: 'Find me a tool that does something like this…'

evidence_cards.claim: The AI search platform landscape fragments, with multiple players (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, etc.) gaining importance.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future-Proofing Your AI Search Strategy: Preparing for 2027 and Beyond
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: The Fragmentation of AI Search Platforms. In 2024, ChatGPT was essentially the only AI search platform that mattered. By 2026, you need to track ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, and several niche players.

evidence_cards.claim: AI search becomes highly personalized, tailoring results and recommendations based on user context, history, and preferences.
evidence_cards.source_title: Future-Proofing Your AI Search Strategy: Preparing for 2027 and Beyond
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: AI search gets personalized. AI systems are developing memory and context awareness… tailor recommendations based on your stated preferences, budget, team size, and industry…

evidence_cards.claim: AI agent services become the dominant revenue driver for frontier AI companies, projected to grow 125x by 2027.
evidence_cards.source_title: OpenAI Revenue Projections to 2027: Can It Reach $100B ARR?
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: The most dramatic growth comes from the AI Agent category, which transforms from a nascent market in 2025 to the dominant revenue driver by 2027. Agents projected $62.6B out of $94.5B total.

evidence_cards.claim: AI search platforms are transitioning to an ad-driven business model to monetize massive free user bases.
evidence_cards.source_title: How AI search is transforming into an ad-driven ecosystem.
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: AI search is transforming into an ad-driven ecosystem… OpenAI… internal projections for free user monetization starting in 2026… Google testing ads in AI overviews.

evidence_cards.claim: Brands must shift from keyword-based SEO to optimizing for citation in AI-generated answers to maintain visibility.
evidence_cards.source_title: How AI search is transforming into an ad-driven ecosystem.
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Your brand won't compete for clicks, it'll compete to be the answer. If the AI doesn't trust your content enough to cite, you're invisible.

evidence_cards.claim: China's AI search market is projected to grow from 79.35 billion RMB in 2022 to 329.35 billion RMB by 2027, CAGR of ~32.93%.
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: 2022年中国AI搜索引擎市场规模达到79.35亿元人民币…预计到2027年将达到329.35亿元人民币…复合年增长率（CAGR）将达到约32.93%

evidence_cards.claim: AI-powered search results provide instant answers, reducing the need for users to click through to websites.
evidence_cards.source_title: SEO Predictions for 2027: What They Mean for Your Business
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: By 2027, these AI-powered results will dominate search pages. Many people won’t even click on a website – they’ll get what they need from AI summaries.

evidence_cards.claim: Voice search becomes a critical user interaction modality, with a large share of searches becoming voice-activated.
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Voice search optimization is critical due to the proliferation of smart devices… ComScore projects that over 50% of searches are voice-activated.

evidence_cards.claim: Search results are highly personalized based on user context, history, and device, leading to different results for different users.
evidence_cards.source_title: SEO Predictions for 2027: What They Mean for Your Business
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: By 2027, everyone’s search experience will look different. Google will know what you’ve searched for, where you are… results adapt in real time.

evidence_cards.claim: Success metrics for search visibility shift from clicks to presence in AI-generated answers, voice responses, and other non-click touchpoints.
evidence_cards.source_title: SEO Predictions for 2027: What They Mean for Your Business
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Success in 2027 will be measured by visibility, trust, and engagement – not just clicks… appearing in AI-generated answers, local results, image searches, voice responses.

evidence_cards.claim: User experience (UX) is identified as the primary bottleneck limiting adoption of AI systems by 2027.
evidence_cards.source_title: Why AI UX is the real bottleneck in 2027
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: the real bottleneck: user experience… designers need to step in now — not just to polish interfaces, but to shape the architecture of AI-driven systems.

evidence_cards.claim: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) emerges as a new practice to optimize content for direct use by AI systems in generated responses.
evidence_cards.source_title: SEO Predictions for 2027: What They Mean for Your Business
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the next evolution of SEO. GEO focuses on optimizing content so that AI systems – like Google’s AI Overviews, ChatGPT, or Microsoft Copilot – can understand and use it directly in their generated responses.
